title: TSK-0153: Extract IBuildMaterialProvider from HtnTaskLibrary (Strategy Pattern)
description:
## Background
Sprint 52 extracted `EmitSurvivalMaterialProvisioning` and `EmitBuildPlacementLoop` from DecomposeBuild, removing the `if/else` block. The next step is to make material provisioning fully injectable via a strategy interface.

## Proposed Interface
```csharp
public interface IBuildMaterialProvider
{
    void EmitProvisioningActions(Blueprint blueprint, WorldState state, List<ActionData> actions);
}
```

## Implementations
- `CreativeMaterialProvider`: no-op (adapter handles inventory)
- `SurvivalMaterialProvider`: calls current `EmitSurvivalMaterialProvisioning`

## Benefits
- DecomposeBuild no longer checks `isCreative` at all — just calls `_materialProvider.EmitProvisioningActions(...)` then `EmitBuildPlacementLoop(...)`
- New game modes (adventure, spectator) can add their own providers
- Testable in isolation — mock the provider and verify placement loop independently

## Files
- New: `Agent.Planning/Decomposition/IBuildMaterialProvider.cs`
- New: `Agent.Planning/Decomposition/CreativeMaterialProvider.cs`
- New: `Agent.Planning/Decomposition/SurvivalMaterialProvider.cs`
- Modified: `Agent.Planning/HtnTaskLibrary.cs` (accept IBuildMaterialProvider)
- Modified: `WebUI.Blazor/Program.cs` (register provider in DI)
